title: Juicy Chemistry is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Juicy Chemistry is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Juicy Chemistry! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Juicy Chemistry:
Juicy Chemistry is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juicy Chemistry!
